vocab.meaning: khu vực không có đồ đạc bừa bộn
vocab.example: I designate my bedroom desk as a cluttered-free zone to minimize visual distractions while I work.

vocab.meaning: thánh đường học thuật (nơi yên tĩnh để học)
vocab.example: The law library is my ultimate academic sanctuary whenever I need to dive deep into complex case studies.

vocab.meaning: ánh sáng bao quanh (ánh sáng môi trường)
vocab.example: I find that soft ambient lighting in boutique coffee shops helps reduce my eye strain during long reading sessions.
When I feel isolated at home, I head to a communal study area to benefit from the 'body doubling' effect of seeing others work.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế hỗ trợ tư duy và sức khỏe (công thái học)
vocab.example: I've invested in an ergonomic setup with a standing desk to maintain my physical comfort during intense study marathons.

vocab.meaning: né tránh/xa lánh các tác nhân gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: I prefer windowless carrels in the basement because they allow me to shun distractions and stay focused on the task at hand.

vocab.meaning: vị trí đắc địa (cách nói ví von chỗ ngồi tốt nhất)
vocab.example: The corner table by the power outlet is prime real estate, so I usually arrive early to claim it.

vocab.meaning: sự phân chia không gian (tách biệt nơi làm việc và nơi nghỉ ngơi)
vocab.example: Practicing spatial compartmentalization by never studying in bed has drastically improved my sleep quality and focus.

vocab.meaning: môi trường tĩnh lặng, khẽ khàng
vocab.example: There is a certain hushed environment in the archives that commands a high level of respect and concentration.
I’ve experimented with various locations, but my home office remains the place where I achieve optimal productivity.
